subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere friends! The honoured Jamshíd hath arrived and made mention of his brethren, yearning for the remembrance of those eager souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان راستان جناب جمشید وارد و نام برادران خویش برد و خواهش یاد آنمشتاقان
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
